# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users.microservice
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 1000

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders.microservice
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 500

  - name: products-service
    url: http://products.microservice
    routes:
      - name: products-route
        paths:
          - /api/products
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 2000

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - '*'
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - X-Requested-With
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
      credentials: true

  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://logs-service/logs
      method: POST
